title: bomarea aurantiaca
intro: Bomarea aurantiaca, also known as the orange glory of the Andes or yellow glory of the Andes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alstroemeriaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bomarea aurantiaca include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
